task_completion.description: DICOM viewer is open and displaying a medical image.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A DICOM viewer application is visible on the screen with a medical image loaded.

task_completion.description: Three distinct line measurements are drawn on the DICOM image.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The DICOM viewer shows at least three separate line annotations with length measurements on different parts of the image.

task_completion.description: An editor is open to create or modify the CSV file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor, terminal editor (like nano/vim), or spreadsheet application is visible, being used to create or edit the CSV file.

task_completion.description: The CSV file contains the correct headers.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The editor shows the exact headers 'Measurement', 'Length', and 'Unit' in the first row.

task_completion.description: The CSV file contains at least three rows of measurement data.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The editor shows at least three rows of data below the headers, containing numeric values corresponding to the lengths.

task_completion.description: A screenshot of the viewer is saved to the correct path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save dialog, terminal command, screenshot tool, or file manager shows a file named 'trial_screenshot.jpg' being saved or existing in the '~/DICOM/exports/' directory.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with a real DICOM viewer to make measurements.
integrity.visual_evidence: Measurements are drawn using the native measurement tools of a DICOM viewer, not painted on using a generic image editor.

integrity.description: The CSV data matches the visual measurements.
integrity.visual_evidence: The numeric length values entered into the CSV file match the numbers displayed on the measurement annotations in the DICOM viewer.

integrity.description: The agent used the exact paths specified in the prompt.
integrity.visual_evidence: The file paths visible in save dialogs or terminal commands exactly match '~/DICOM/exports/trial_data.csv' and '~/DICOM/exports/trial_screenshot.jpg'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected CSV output path is '/home/ga/DICOM/exports/trial_data.csv'. The expected screenshot path is '/home/ga/DICOM/exports/trial_screenshot.jpg'. The CSV must contain at least 3 data rows plus a header row.
